# Coverage Map Template

<!--
  USAGE: Canonical format for coverage map artefacts produced by the /coverage-map skill.
  One coverage map per feature (covers all stories with test plans).
  Generated from existing test plan artefacts — no new data entry required.
  Read-only: does not change test plans or story artefacts.

  To evolve this format: update this file, open a PR, tag QA lead + engineering lead.
-->

## Coverage Map — [Feature Name]

**Feature:** [feature-slug]
**Generated:** [YYYY-MM-DD]
**Generated by:** /coverage-map skill
**Stories included:** [n]

---

## Summary

| Metric | Count |
|--------|-------|
| Total ACs | [n] |
| Fully automated (🟢) | [n] |
| Manual-only medium risk (🟡) | [n] |
| Manual-only high risk / CSS-layout-dependent (🔴) | [n] |
| Coverage risk | 🔴 red / 🟡 yellow / 🟢 green |

---

## Feature rollup

| Story | ACs | Automated | Manual-only | 🔴 High risk gaps | 🟡 Medium | Status |
|-------|-----|-----------|-------------|------------------|-----------|--------|
| [Story title] | [n] | [n] | [n] | [n] | [n] | ✅ / ⚠️ / 🔴 |

<!--
  Status legend:
  ✅  All ACs automated
  ⚠️  Manual-only gaps present (🟡 or 🔴)
  🔴  CSS-layout-dependent gaps present
-->

---

## Per-story detail

<!--
  One <details> block per story. Collapsed by default — expand to view per-AC rows.
-->

<details>
<summary>Story: [Story title] — [n]/[n] automated · [status emoji] [n] gap(s)</summary>

| AC | Description | Unit | Intg | E2E | Manual | Gap type | Risk |
|----|-------------|------|------|-----|--------|----------|------|
| 1  | [AC description] | ✓ / — | ✓ / — | ✓ / — | ✓ / — | — / CSS-layout-dependent / render-only / external-service / other | 🟢 / 🟡 / 🔴 |

<!--
  Gap type key:
  —                       = no gap (AC is covered by at least one automated test)
  CSS-layout-dependent    = cannot be verified in Jest/jsdom; E2E or manual-only+RISK-ACCEPT required
  render-only             = visual check; manual + screenshot evidence expected
  external-service        = depends on real external system; mock + manual smoke expected
  other                   = describe specifically in the Handling column

  Risk key:
  🟢 = at least one automated test covers this AC
  🟡 = manual-only, gap type is render-only, external-service, or unspecified
  🔴 = manual-only, gap type is CSS-layout-dependent (or no coverage at all)
-->

**Gaps in this story:**
| Gap description | AC | Gap type | Handling | RISK-ACCEPT in /decisions? |
|-----------------|----|----------|----------|---------------------------|
| [description] | AC[n] | CSS-layout-dependent | Manual-only | Yes / No |

</details>

---

## Gap action register

<!--
  Consolidated list of all 🔴 and 🟡 gaps across all stories.
  For each gap: track whether it was RISK-ACCEPTed before coding, and whether the
  manual scenario was executed before merge.
-->

| Gap | Story | AC | Gap type | Risk | RISK-ACCEPT? | Manual verified? |
|-----|-------|----|----------|------|-------------|-----------------|
| [description] | [story title] | AC[n] | CSS-layout-dependent | 🔴 | Yes — [decisions.md entry] / No | Yes — [date] / No |

  Optional: record when coverage changed (e.g. E2E tests added after initial manual-only decision).
-->

| Date | Change | By |
|------|--------|----|
| [YYYY-MM-DD] | Initial coverage map generated | /coverage-map |
| [YYYY-MM-DD] | [E2E test added for AC[n] / RISK-ACCEPT logged / etc.] | [human / skill] |
